body:
AUDIT: the 'Live DreamLens integration' next-task in claude_update.md (dated 06-12) is SUPERSEDED — already built in Phase 5. Verified: load_lens_prompt() env-override (URBI_DREAM_LENS_PROMPT) + explicit-path + repo-default prompts/urbi_lens_prompt.md (the DreamLens contradiction-hint prompt) + LENS_SYSTEM fallback; OllamaDreamLens env wiring (MODEL/BASE/TIMEOUT/MAX_RECORDS); offline-degrades-to-[]; sanitizer intact. Tests present + green: test_prompt_file_matches_contradiction_hint_schema, test_prompt_loader_falls_back_when_missing, test_env_prompt_override_loads_file, test_env_config_does_not_require_network (+ my 5 sanitizer tests). Full suite 322 OK, floor True. NO PATCH RECOMMENDED — re-implementing would be churn.

OPTIONAL (LOW): the brief listed URBI_DREAM_LENS_ENABLED=false; it is NOT wired. Already mitigated by NullDreamLens being the default lens (live path is opt-in), so this is defense-in-depth, not a hole. If you want it: add an `enabled` resolver = (explicit transport present) or env URBI_DREAM_LENS_ENABLED (default false); must NOT break the 15 tests that inject a transport. Your call.

Next real undone item per roadmap §7: NEXT+ Transport/persistence ADR (design, my lane). I can draft it.
objective: DreamLens live integration — VERIFIED COMPLETE; no patch needed
summary: claude_update.md §2-3 (Live DreamLens integration) is already implemented + tested in your Phase 5. Verified all paths green. One optional defense-in-depth note.
